name: Source Code
description: Core Python modules for loading canon data, aligning corpora across traditions, and building comparison graphs.

name: Analysis Notebooks
description: Jupyter notebooks that consume the src modules to compute canon overlap, translation lineage, topic modeling, and final visualizations.

name: Data & Outputs
description: Raw source data placeholders, canon metadata reference lists, and generated figure output directories for the thesis analysis.

name: Documentation
description: Project overview, thesis proposal, and research-journal documents describing the project's research question and methodology.

name: Configuration
description: Project-level and tooling configuration, including Python dependencies and the knowledge-graph tool's ignore rules.
